message:
feat: Implement 30+ TODO stubs with real functionality

C-API Object Implementations:
- unicode_formatter: Full integer/float/complex formatting with all format types (d/i/x/X/o/b/f/e/g/%)
- unicode_format: Complete % string formatting with spec parsing
- memoryobject: Subscript get/set, slice handling, richcompare with content comparison
- enumobject: Full enumerate with start kwarg, index overflow handling, sequence iterator fallback
- dictobject: Key equality via PyObject_RichCompareBool, MergeFromSeq2 iteration
- call: PyVectorcall_Call protocol, method calls, varargs conversion
- odictobject: Full repr, ordered comparison, iterator values/items, set/del operations
- genericaliasobject: repr, subscript, isinstance/subclass checks, parameter extraction
- unionobject: repr, set comparison, deduplication, parameter substitution
- codeobject: repr formatting, PyCode_NewEmpty

Runtime/VM:
- vm.zig: setGlobals/setLocals/exportGlobals/exportLocals for exec() scope support
- pythonrun.zig: execWithScope using VM scope methods
- cli.zig: Thread spawning for concurrent client handling, bytecode VM execution
- opcode.zig: var→const fixes for Zig 0.15

WebSocket:
- client.zig: TLS support for wss:// via TlsConnection integration

All implementations are functional code, not comment changes.
